name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubGrpLvlAgtExtr

text.value:
@concat(
'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging,'.IdsDmMbrshDmSubGrpLvlAgtExtr_TMP; ',
'WITH CTE AS ( SELECT s.GRP_ID, s.SUBGRP_ID, s.CLS_PLN_ID, s.AGNT_ID, COALESCE(role_cd.TRGT_CD,'''') AS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN s.EFF_DT_SK IS NULL OR s.EFF_DT_SK = '''' THEN NULL ELSE CONVERT(DATETIME, s.EFF_DT_SK, 120) END AS EFF_DT, CASE WHEN s.TERM_DT_SK IS NULL OR s.TERM_DT_SK = '''' THEN NULL ELSE CONVERT(DATETIME, s.TERM_DT_SK, 120) END AS TERM_DT, COALESCE(src_cd.TRGT_CD,''UNK'') AS SRC_SYS_CD, ',string(pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle),' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, s.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,
'.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT s LEFT JOIN ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,
'.CD_MPPNG src_cd ON s.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = src_cd.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,
'.CD_MPPNG role_cd ON s.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK = role_cd.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE s.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_SK NOT IN (0,1) ) SELECT * INTO ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging,
'.IdsDmMbrshDmSubGrpLvlAgtExtr_TMP FROM CTE;' )

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2010 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY        
                           
PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT and loads the DataMart table MBRSH_DM_SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT

                                                                                       MBRSH_DM_SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT.dat                                                      IntegrateNewDevl                                          Jag Yelavarthi             2014-09-03

Annotations:
Read from source table SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT from IDS.
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubGrpLvlAgtExtr
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Write MBRSH_DM_SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmMbrshpDmIndBeLtrLoad.
